# sign_in { #socialinfrascorepy.sign_in }

```python
sign_in(client, email, password)
```

Sign in with email and password.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type     | Description                                       | Default    |
|----------|----------|---------------------------------------------------|------------|
| client   | SIClient | A client from :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.client`. | _required_ |
| email    | str      | User email address.                               | _required_ |
| password | str      | User password.                                    | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                                                                     |
|--------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | dict   | A dictionary with keys ``client`` (authenticated :class:`SIClient`), ``session``, and ``data``. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> auth = si.sign_in(cli, os.environ["EMAIL"], os.environ["PASSWORD"])
>>> authed = auth["client"]
```
